events.name: CRSSD Festival
events.note: Boutique waterfront electronic music festival at Waterfront Park. Known for curated, intimate lineup.

events.name: Time Warp
events.note: 19 hours of continuous music across 5 stages, 47 artists. Autumn Edition discontinued — only one Time Warp Germany per year.

events.name: Ultra Music Festival
events.note: 26th edition. 150+ artists including Adam Beyer B2B Joseph Capriati, Eric Prydz, Carl Cox, Armin van Buuren.

events.name: DGTL Festival
events.note: Easter weekend edition. Also has an ADE edition Oct 22–25 at NDSM Warehouse.

events.name: Coachella Valley Music and Arts Festival
events.note: Headliners: Sabrina Carpenter (Fri), Justin Bieber (Sat), Karol G (Sun). Also: Anyma, The xx, The Strokes, Young Thug, BigBang, KATSEYE, BINI (1st Filipino group at Coachella), Disclosure, Armin van Buuren. Sold out.

events.name: Stagecoach
events.note: California's premier country music festival. Headliners: Cody Johnson, Post Malone.

events.name: New Orleans Jazz & Heritage Festival
events.date: Late Apr – Early May (TBD — in 2025: Apr 24 – May 4)
events.note: 56th year. Celebrates jazz and diverse musical traditions. Exact 2026 dates TBD.

events.name: EDC Las Vegas
events.location: Las Vegas Motor Speedway, NV, USA
events.note: SOLD OUT. 200+ DJs, 7 stages, camping May 14–17. EDC Week runs May 13–19 across the Strip. 18+.

events.name: Lightning in a Bottle
events.location: Buena Vista Aquatic Recreation Area, Bakersfield, CA
events.note: 23rd edition over Memorial Day Weekend. All ages, camping available. Headliners: Empire of the Sun, Zeds Dead, Mau P.

events.name: BottleRock Napa Valley
events.note: Music, wine, craft brew, and culinary festival. Headliners: Foo Fighters, Lorde, LCD Soundsystem, Backstreet Boys.

events.name: Movement Detroit
events.note: All ages (kids 12 and under free). 6 stages. The birthplace of techno's premier electronic music festival.

events.name: Glastonbury
events.date: Fallow year — NOT happening in 2026 (in 2025: Jun 25–29)
events.note: On hiatus in 2026 to allow the land to recover. Returns 2027.

events.name: Primavera Sound Barcelona
events.note: Lineup: Doja Cat, The Cure, Addison Rae, Little Simz, Gorillaz, Skrillex.

events.name: Sónar Barcelona (33rd)
events.note: 33rd edition. Unified venue format — all music at Fira Gran Via. 90+ artists, 6 stages, uninterrupted programming. Artists: Kelis, Skepta, Charlotte de Witte, Amelie Lens (AURA), WhoMadeWho, Nia Archives, Boys Noize, Gerd Janson b2b Marcel Dettmann. Includes Sónar+D innovation conference.

events.name: OFFSónar (Sónar Week)
events.note: Parties across Barcelona alongside Sónar. Confirmed: ELROW, Keinemusik (Rampa & Adam Port), Maceo Plex, Adriatique, Mau P.

events.name: Electric Forest
events.location: Double JJ Resort, Rothbury, MI, USA
events.note: 14th edition. Headliners: GRiZ, ILLENIUM, Chris Lake, Excision, KASKADE, The String Cheese Incident.

events.name: Essence Festival of Culture
events.note: Annual celebration of Black culture and music at Caesars Superdome. Exact 2026 dates TBD.

events.name: Awakenings Festival
events.note: 80,000 visitors from 80+ countries. Saturday, camping, and weekend tickets already sold out. 18+.

events.name: Tomorrowland
events.note: Fantasy-themed EDM festival. 400,000+ attendees from 200+ countries. 10-day event. Exact 2026 dates TBD.

events.name: Latitude Festival
events.note: 20th anniversary. Lineup: David Byrne, Lewis Capaldi, Teddy Swims. Exact 2026 dates TBD.

events.name: Dekmantel Festival
events.note: 12th edition with 160+ acts. Expanded 'Dekmantel at Dawn' format: 36 hours across three 12-hour days. City events at Paradiso, Melkweg, Oude Kerk. 18+.

events.name: Lollapalooza Chicago
events.note: Headliners: Doechii, Chappell Roan, Sabrina Carpenter, Tyler the Creator.

events.name: Osheaga
events.note: Lineup: Gunna, Kehlani, Clipse, JID, Little Simz.

events.name: HARD Summer
events.note: 18+ (VIP 21+). 60+ acts across 300 acres. Headliners: Kali Uchis, Charlotte de Witte, Amelie Lens, DJ Snake.

events.name: Sziget Festival
events.note: Week-long island festival spanning pop, rock, and EDM. Exact 2026 dates TBD.

events.name: Outside Lands
events.location: Golden Gate Park, San Francisco, CA
events.note: Multi-genre festival with food, art, and music. Focus on sustainability.

events.name: Reading & Leeds Festival
events.note: Dave, RAYE, Skepta, JADE among first wave.

events.name: All Points East
events.note: Tyler the Creator headlines both nights.

events.name: Ohana Festival
events.location: Doheny State Beach, Dana Point, CA
events.note: Indie, surfer rock, and alternative music. Half of proceeds benefit California coastal park preservation. Exact 2026 dates TBD.

events.name: Aftershock Festival
events.note: West Coast's largest rock and metal festival.

events.name: Portola Music Festival
events.note: Fast-rising electronic and dance music festival. Established itself as one of the premier US festivals. Exact 2026 dates TBD.

events.name: Desert Daze
events.note: Psychedelic, indie, and experimental music festival with camping and scenic mountain views. Exact 2026 dates TBD.

events.name: Head Trip
events.location: Empire Polo Club, Indio, CA, USA
events.note: Brand-new one-time-only electronic festival on the Coachella grounds. Calvin Harris (Day 1), Swedish House Mafia (Day 2). Also: Skrillex, Peggy Gou b2b Four Tet, Fisher b2b Chris Lake, Dom Dolla b2b Kettama, Floating Points' Sunflower Sound System (US debut). Single stage, no overlapping sets.

events.name: Amsterdam Dance Event (ADE)
events.note: 30th anniversary edition. 2,500+ artists, 1,000+ events at 200+ venues. Includes professional conference and festival programming.

events.name: Lollapalooza Brasil (13ª edição)
events.note: Headliners: Sabrina Carpenter & Deftones (Sex), Chappell Roan & Skrillex (Sáb), Tyler the Creator & Lorde (Dom). 72 atrações, 4 palcos. Estreia do palco Foto em Grupo.

events.name: Rock in Rio
events.location: Cidade do Rock, Rio de Janeiro
events.note: Mega-festival bianual. Confirmados: Elton John, Gilberto Gil, Stray Kids, Jamiroquai, Maroon 5, Demi Lovato, Mumford & Sons, João Gomes & Orquestra Brasileira.

events.name: Rock The Mountain
events.note: Festival de 6 dias em 2 fins de semana. Confirmados: Ivete Sangalo, Jorja Smith, João Gomes ft. Jota.Pê & Mestrinho. 100+ artistas. Em 2025 recebeu 150 mil pessoas.

events.name: Primavera Sound São Paulo
events.note: Edição paulistana do festival de Barcelona.

events.name: Monsters of Rock 2026
events.note: Guns N' Roses, Lynyrd Skynyrd, Halestorm, Extreme, Yngwie Malmsteen, Dirty Honey.

events.name: Arena Brasileira
events.note: Lineup: Anitta, Caetano Veloso, Marisa Monte, Ludmilla, Ivete Sangalo, Marina Sena, Vanessa da Mata, João Gomes, Matuê, Iza, Ana Carolina.

events.name: Festival Coolritiba
events.note: Lineup: Anavitória, Gilsons, Céu, Lagum, Djonga, Marina Sena, Ana Frango Elétrico, Mundo Livre S/A.

events.name: Festival da Lua Cheia
events.note: Lineup: Edson Gomes, Mano Brown, Melly, Céu, Braza.

events.name: Time Warp Brasil
events.note: Edição brasileira do prestigiado festival alemão de techno/eletrônica.

events.name: Village Rio
events.note: Lineup: Anitta, Seu Jorge, Vintage Culture, Marisa Monte, Ludmilla, Luísa Sonza, Pabllo Vittar, Matuê.

events.name: Grammy Awards (68th)
events.note: Biggest winner: Kendrick Lamar (5 wins). Bad Bunny won Album of the Year for Debí Tirar Más Fotos — first Spanish-language album to win. Last year on CBS.

events.name: BRIT Awards
events.note: First time outside London — two-year deal with Manchester. Hosted by Jack Whitehall. Broadcast on ITV1/ITVX.

events.name: iHeartRadio Music Awards
events.location: Dolby Theatre, Los Angeles, CA, USA
events.note: Aired live on FOX. Taylor Swift won seven awards; Miley Cyrus received the Innovator Award.

events.name: American Music Awards (52nd)
events.location: MGM Grand Garden Arena, Las Vegas, NV, USA
events.note: Live on CBS/Paramount+. Fan-voted. Nominations Apr 14; voting Apr 14 – May 8.

events.name: D&AD Awards & Festival
events.note: Judging May 17–20; winners announced May 20.

events.name: BET Awards
events.location: Peacock Theater, Los Angeles, CA, USA
events.note: Part of 'Culture's Biggest Week' — BETX fan experience runs Jun 25–27 in LA. Honors Black artists across music, film, and culture.

events.name: MTV Video Music Awards (VMAs)
events.note: Annual celebration of music video art. Video of the Year, Artist of the Year, Song of the Year, Best New Artist. Fan-voted. Exact 2026 date TBD.

events.name: Mercury Prize
events.note: Annual UK album award for artistic merit.

events.name: Dove Awards (57th)
events.note: Gospel Music Association annual awards.

events.name: NRJ Music Awards (28th)
events.note: 28th edition. Hosted by Nikos Aliagas, broadcast on TF1 and NRJ. Nominees announced Sep 14.

events.name: Billboard Latin Music Awards
events.note: Longest-running Latin music award show (since 1994). Exact 2026 date TBD.

events.name: UK Music Video Awards (UKMVAs)
events.note: 38 competitive categories by genre, craft, and company. UK, international, and newcomer sub-categories. Includes the returning US MVPA Awards.

events.name: MTV Europe Music Awards (EMAs)
events.note: Paused in 2025 due to Paramount/Skydance merger. Return in 2026 not yet confirmed.

events.name: Billboard Music Awards
events.note: Chart-based awards. Exact 2026 date TBD.

events.name: Latin Grammy Awards (27th)
events.note: Includes Best Music Video category. 2025: Bad Bunny won five categories. Exact 2026 date TBD.

events.name: CMA Awards
events.note: Major country music award show. Exact 2026 date TBD.

events.name: Rock and Roll Hall of Fame Induction
events.note: Annual induction ceremony broadcast on HBO. Exact 2026 date TBD.

events.name: ARIA Music Awards
events.note: Australia's premier music awards. Includes Best Music Video category.

events.name: People's Choice Awards
events.note: Fan-voted across music, film, and TV categories. No official 2026 date announced yet.

events.name: Prêmio Multishow (32ª edição) — incl. Clipe TVZ do Ano
events.note: Maior premiação musical do Brasil. 5 categorias com voto popular incluindo 'Clipe TVZ do Ano'. Transmissão TV Globo & Multishow. Data exata de 2026 a confirmar.

events.name: Prêmio BTG Pactual da Música Brasileira (33ª edição)
events.note: Considerado o Grammy brasileiro. 18 categorias. Homenageado 2026: Cazuza. Indicados: João Gomes, Marina Sena, Emicida, Marisa Monte, Ivete Sangalo, Djavan, Caetano Veloso, Fresno, BK' e mais.

events.name: Music Video Festival (m-v-f-) Awards
events.note: Premiação brasileira de videoclipes. Categorias: Melhor Videoclipe (júri e audiência), Melhor Vídeo Latino-americano, Melhor Direção.

events.name: Prêmio APCA (categorias musicais)
events.note: Premiação cultural mais antiga do Brasil (desde 1951). Abrange música popular e erudita. Escolhido por críticos.

events.name: Latin Grammy — indicados brasileiros
events.note: Artistas brasileiros competem regularmente. Vencedores 2025: Hamilton de Holanda, Chitãozinho e Xororó, Luedji Luna. Data exata de 2026 a confirmar.

events.name: Billboard Brasil — Mulheres do Ano
events.note: Edição brasileira do Billboard Women in Music. Parte do programa global com categoria dedicada Brazil Global Force Award.

events.name: MIDEM
events.note: Global meeting for music industry leaders. Focus on rights, innovation, AI.

events.name: SXSW Music Conference & Festival (40th)
events.note: 40th edition. New format — convention center closed. Topics: AI, streaming fraud, fan data. Curators: Billboard, Rolling Stone, NPR Music, Sony Music Latin.

events.name: MUSEXPO
events.note: Top music business conference with panels, keynotes, networking, and showcases.

events.name: Departure Festival + Conference (fmr. Canadian Music Week)
events.note: Rebranded from Canadian Music Week. Music, art, comedy, and tech conference + festival. Speakers: Sarah McLachlan, Bob Lefsetz. Departure Honours at Koerner Hall (May 7).

events.name: Music Sustainability Summit
events.note: 3rd annual. Speakers from Live Nation, AEG, Oak View Group. Focus: practical decarbonization.

events.name: Pollstar Live!
events.note: World's largest gathering of live entertainment professionals. Exact 2026 date TBD.

events.name: Billboard Latin Music Week + Awards
events.note: Includes the Billboard Latin Music Awards. Explores diversity and revenue of Latin music. Exact 2026 date TBD.

events.name: Latin Alternative Music Conference (LAMC)
events.note: Annual gathering of Latin alternative music industry professionals.

events.name: Mondo.NYC
events.note: Music & tech business conference and showcase festival.

events.name: Music Tectonics Conference
events.note: Intersection of music, technology, and business.

events.name: jump.global Summit
events.note: Global music industry summit.

events.name: She Is The Music — Sharing the Spotlight (Grammy Week)
events.note: Grammy Week edition. Honored Gracie Abrams and 50 impactful women. Co-founded by Alicia Keys, Jody Gerson (UMPG CEO), Ann Mincieli, Sam Kirby Yoh (UTA).

events.name: She Is The Music — Sharing the Spotlight (2nd Annual)
events.note: 2026 honorees: Megan Moroney (Artist Spotlight) and Sylvia Rhone (Trailblazer Spotlight). Sponsored by Spotify Equal, Live Nation Women, Believe Tunecore.

events.name: Billboard Women in Music 2026
events.note: Hosted by Keke Palmer. Women of the Year: EJAE, Audrey Nuna & Rei Ami (HUNTR/X). Honorees: Teyana Taylor, Tate McRae, Ella Langley, Kehlani, Laufey, Mariah the Scientist, Zara Larsson, Thalia.

events.name: Music Week Women in Music Awards
events.note: With Association of Independent Music and UK Music. Trans- and genderqueer-inclusive. Entries open May 12.

events.name: The Weeknd — After Hours Til Dawn Tour
events.note: Wembley Stadium Aug 14–19 (UK). São Paulo: Apr 30 at MorumBis. Support: Anitta (Latin leg), Playboi Carti (Europe).

events.name: Ariana Grande — Eternal Sunshine Tour
events.note: First full tour since 2019. Oakland (Jun 6) → London O2 (Sep). LA: Crypto.com Arena Jun 13–14 + Kia Forum Jun 17, 19–20.

events.name: Bad Bunny — Debí TiRAR MáS FOToS World Tour
events.note: 57 shows. São Paulo: Feb 20–21 at Allianz Parque.

events.name: Lady Gaga — The Mayhem Ball
events.note: Continues 2025 launch. Mayhem album #1 Billboard 200. LA: Kia Forum Feb 18–23.

events.name: Ed Sheeran — Loop Tour
events.note: North American leg Jun–Nov. LA: SoFi Stadium Aug 8.

events.name: My Chemical Romance — The Black Parade 2026
events.location: South America, Asia, Europe, North America
events.note: Global tour. Classic album playthrough. LA: Hollywood Bowl Oct 21–24 & 30–31.

events.name: AC/DC — Power Up Tour
events.note: São Paulo: Feb 24, 28 & Mar 4 (all sold out). Then North America.

events.name: Bruno Mars — The Romantic Tour
events.note: 6 nights at Wembley. LA: SoFi Stadium Sep 30 – Oct 7. First UK/Europe since 2017.

events.name: BTS — World Tour (return)
events.note: Return from military service. Tottenham Hotspur Stadium (London). LA: SoFi Stadium.

events.name: Harry Styles
events.note: São Paulo: Jul 17 at MorumBis.

events.name: Rosalía — LUX Tour
events.note: 42 arena shows. Brazil: Aug 10 at Farmasi Arena, Rio de Janeiro. Also Bogotá, Buenos Aires, Santiago, Mexico City, San Juan.

events.name: Doja Cat — Tour Ma Vie World Tour
events.note: LA: Kia Forum Oct 22. Supporting album Vie.

events.name: Lorde
events.note: LA: Kia Forum May 14–15. São Paulo: Lollapalooza Brasil (Mar 22).

events.name: Metallica — M72 World Tour (encore leg)
events.note: Double-night stadium run. Greece, Poland, Germany, Italy, UK, Ireland.

events.name: Gilberto Gil — Tempo Rei (ÚLTIMO SHOW)
events.note: Despedida dos grandes palcos após 60 anos. Visto por 620 mil+ pessoas pelo Brasil. Convidados especiais: Gilsons, Flor Gil, Mãeana. Esgotado.

events.name: Titãs — Cabeça Dinossauro 40 anos
events.note: Celebrando 40 anos do icônico álbum de 1986.

events.name: Cidade Negra
events.note: Lendas do reggae brasileiro em turnê.

events.name: CarnaUOL
events.note: Festival pré-Carnaval. Lineup: Kesha, Pabllo Vittar, João Gomes, Marina Sena.

events.name: Bad Bunny
events.note: Duas noites. Debí TiRAR MáS FOToS World Tour, perna sul-americana.

events.name: AC/DC — Power Up Tour
events.note: Três shows esgotados. Perna paulistana da turnê sul-americana.

events.name: Lollapalooza Brasil (13ª edição)
events.note: 72 atrações. Headliners: Sabrina Carpenter & Deftones (Sex), Chappell Roan & Skrillex (Sáb), Tyler the Creator & Lorde (Dom). Estreia do palco Foto em Grupo.

events.name: Foto em Grupo (estreia no palco)
events.note: Supergrupo: Ana Caetano (Anavitória), Pedro Calais & Zani (Lagum), João Ferreira (Daparte). Lollapalooza marca primeira apresentação do grupo.

events.name: Mano Brown MB10 + Rael & Rincon Sapiência
events.note: Frontman dos Racionais MC's com convidados especiais.

events.name: Monsters of Rock 2026
events.note: Guns N' Roses, Lynyrd Skynyrd, Halestorm, Extreme, Yngwie Malmsteen, Dirty Honey.

events.name: Emicida — Racional MCMV Tour
events.note: Show imersivo baseado em 'Emicida Racional VL 2 – Mesmas Cores & Mesmos Valores'. Também: Rio (Mai 16), Curitiba (Jun 27), Recife (Ago 22), BH (Set 5).

events.note: Lendas do heavy metal.

events.note: Ícone da MPB brasileira.

events.note: Lendas do nu-metal com Spiritbox de apoio.

events.note: After Hours Til Dawn Tour, data sul-americana.

events.note: Primeiro show solo no Brasil.

events.note: Celebrando 50 anos de história.

events.name: Marina Sena
events.note: Em turnê com Coisas Naturais (2025). Aparições: CarnaUOL (Jan 24), Arena Brasileira (SP, a confirmar), e festivais por todo o Brasil.
